description: Review exhaustive de la section gestionnaire/import: corrections de bugs, simplification du code, et geocoding différé via after().

userStories.title: Bug fixes: auth, status, SSE errors, dates, AbortController, phase index, activity log
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the import to work correctly so that my data is imported without silent failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Import page has server-side auth wrapper (getServerAuthContext)
Import job status is 'failed' when errors exist, not always 'completed'
SSE error events are properly distinguished from JSON parse errors
AbortController cancels SSE stream on component unmount
Contract end date calculation handles month overflow correctly
Phase index in progress UI matches actual pipeline phases
logCompleteImport uses correct property names from parsed types
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: 7 bugs fixed: auth wrapper (Server Component), status always completed, SSE error swallowing, AbortController on unmount, setMonth overflow, phase index offset, activity log property names.

userStories.title: Simplify: dead code cleanup, validator dedup, shared components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the import codebase simplified so it's maintainable and under 500 LOC per file.
acceptanceCriteria: Unused column mappings removed from constants.ts
Unused API route app/api/import/execute/route.ts removed if dead
Shared validator utilities extracted (normalizeCountry, normalizePhone)
Demo/example data moved out of constants.ts into template-generator
N+1 queries in validateAgainstDatabase batched with Promise.all
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created validators/utils.ts with 3 shared functions (mapZodErrorToCode, normalizeCountry, normalizePhone). Removed 5 unused column mappings from constants.ts. Deleted dead /api/import/execute route. Batched building+lot N+1 queries with Promise.all. Demo data stays in constants.ts (used by template-generator, moving would add complexity for no gain).

userStories.title: Deferred geocoding: remove Phase 0, use after() for background geocoding
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the import to complete in seconds without waiting for geocoding so I can continue working immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Phase 0 geocoding removed from synchronous import pipeline
Addresses created without coordinates during import
after() in SSE route triggers geocodePendingAddresses() post-response
geocodePendingAddresses() added to address.service.ts
Progress UI shows 5 phases (companies, contacts, buildings, lots, contracts)
ImportPhase type updated (geocoding removed)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Removed Phase 0 geocoding from sync pipeline. All createAddress calls pass null geocode. Import returns addressIdsToGeocode[]. SSE route uses after() to trigger geocodePendingAddresses(). Added batch geocoding method to AddressService (10 parallel, 250ms delay). Phase indices shifted: companies=0, contacts=1, buildings=2, lots=3, contracts=4.
